replies.author: @ffaubert1
replies.text: I'm a Neanderthal.  I've closed my Twitter, Instagram and Facebook accounts. I firmly believe these are why we are in the state we are.

replies.author: @kyleb3754
replies.text: @ffaubert1  Neanderthals are smarter than the billions of idiots on earth.  The internet (while sometimes great, such as this channel!) is responsible for 90% of the state we're in.  Without instant communication, people can't riot for no reason, terrorists can't collaborate, fake news can't propagate, ETC.  So yessir, Mr Neanderthal, you are the smart one!

replies.author: @kreynolds1123
replies.text:
@kyleb3754 and @frank_f, I realize so far the discussion is a little toung in cheak in some sense, but I wanted to mention somethings anyways. 

scientist will tell us there's very little if any evidence that Neanderthals  were dumb or less intelligent than Sapiens. They had bigger brains used tools and had complex social interactions. 

Some people think that homosapien are still around and homoneanderthal aren't because sapiens were "smarter".   that hypothesis lacks any scientific evidence. 

Alternate possibilities to our continued existence and not Neanderthals may likely be because humans brought tropical diseases to sparcely populated groups of Neanderthals at the end of the ice ages.  Sapien and Neanderthal hybrids may have produced infertile males for a generation two or three as is the case with many hybrid cats, in which case deseases, climate change, and genetic swamping from human migration  could have been a perfect storm to the Neanderthal's demise.  These are theories but far better than being sapiens ignorant to how wrongly smug we can be about our suposid intelligence.
